# Auto-generated pinned CORE dependencies (no torch), for pip users not using uv.
# Source of truth is pyproject.toml + uv.lock; regenerate with:
#    uv export --no-hashes --no-emit-project > requirements.txt
#
# Recommended install is uv (reproducible, manages Python):  uv sync
# For the optional second-opinion CNN, also install torch:   uv sync --extra cnn
#    (or with pip:  pip install -r requirements.txt "torch>=2.0")
numpy==2.2.6 ; python_full_version < '3.11'
    # via
    #   nanowire-detection
    #   opencv-python-headless
numpy==2.4.6 ; python_full_version == '3.11.*'
    # via
    #   nanowire-detection
    #   opencv-python-headless
numpy==2.5.0 ; python_full_version >= '3.12'
    # via
    #   nanowire-detection
    #   opencv-python-headless
opencv-python-headless==4.13.0.92
    # via nanowire-detection
